_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate strategic planning efforts with internal and external partners
reference_document_element_description: Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, including commercial terms, roadmap alignment, dependency management, and exit strategy planning.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Skill LS-S-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.505), DG-T-014 (DG, cosine: 0.486).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.473). Shared vocabulary: [planning, strategic]. NICE-only terms [coordinate, efforts, external, internal, partners] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alignment, commercial, data, dependency, exit] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.875, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 9-word NICE element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Coordinate strategic planning efforts with internal and external partners" and "Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.568 > STS 0.473 (gap +0.095). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [planning, strategic] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [planning, strategic]. NICE-only: [coordinate, efforts, external, internal, partners]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alignment, commercial, data, dependency, exit].

signals.detail: STS 0.473 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
